subcodes.first_line: O thou my dear heavenly daughter, The epistle dated Mach 25th from Mont Pelerin was received. From the contents the utmost joy was obtained
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دختر عزیز ملکوتی من نامه بیست و پنجم مارچ از مانت پلرین رسید از مضمون
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @charitable associations; humanitarian activities
